# Concept Note

## Concept Summary

UBUNIFU SACCO proposes to develop and deploy a **Digital SACCO Platform** - an integrated mobile and web application enabling members to save, borrow, transact, and access financial education from any location.

## Theory of Change

*If* low-income earners have access to affordable, digital-first cooperative financial services, *then* they will increase savings, reduce reliance on predatory lenders, and build long-term financial resilience.

## Proposed Solution

| Component | Description |
|---|---|
| Mobile App | Savings, loan applications, statements |
| USSD Channel | Feature-phone access for rural members |
| Agent Network | Last-mile cash-in/cash-out services |
| Financial Literacy | In-app modules and community workshops |
| Data Dashboard | Management reporting and analytics |

## Expected Outcomes
- 5,000 new digital members enrolled
- KES 20M in new savings mobilized
- 3,000 loans disbursed digitally
- 80% member satisfaction score
